raw_consumer_statement: I returned several items to XXXX XXXX XXXX, FL. After the salesperson took it she informed me it will take several weeks to show on the card because XXXX item was XXXX party. I waited for the following statement and nothing had changed. Now I began the dozens of calls. The amount was {$17.00}. I call and they agree with me to even giving me a CONFIRMATION NUMBERS and nothing happens. Now is up to {$49.00} with late charges. My XXXX XXXX XXXX has gone from XXXX to XXXX. My last conversation with XXXX XXXX on XX/XX/year> @ XXXX pm. Her Id # XXXX she said these exact words ( dispute has been rectified {$.00} balance cant give you a confirmation # they will send confirmation # XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX, ) So later that day I received an investigation billing dispute email case ID # XXXX. Its a shame that something so simple can take so much pain. Every month I speak to several agents they are very polite but unable to do anything. Please help. Thank you. XXXX XXXX XXXX
